zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford於1385年8月15日出生在英國艾可卡素 丁加姆時，他的父親Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford48歲，母親Alice FitzWalter41歲。他於大約1399年與Alice Holland在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1417年2月15日在英國艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內享年31歲，埋葬在英國艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford于1385年8月15日出生在英国艾可卡素 丁加姆时，他的父亲Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford48岁，母亲Alice FitzWalter41岁。他于大约1399年与Alice Holland在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他于1415年登记服兵役。他去世于1417年2月15日在英国艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內享年31岁，埋葬在英国艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford was born on 15 August 1385, in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, his father, Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford, was 48 and his mother, Alice FitzWalter, was 41. He married Alice Holland about 1399, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. He registered for military service in 1415. He died on 15 February 1417, in Earls Colne, Essex, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in Earls Colne, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford est né le 15 août 1385, à Castle Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzWalter, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Alice Holland environ 1399, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé le 15 février 1417, à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford am 15. August 1385 in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford 48 und seine Mutter Alice FitzWalter 41. Er hat um 1399 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Alice Holland geheiratet. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 15. Februar 1417 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Earls Colne, Essex, England und wurde in Earls Colne, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford è nato il il 15 agosto 1385 nel Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Alice FitzWalter, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Alice Holland circa 1399, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì il 15 febbraio 1417, nel Earls Colne, Essex, England, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Earls Colne, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxfordが1385年8月15日にイギリスエセックスカストル ヘディンガムで生まれた時，父Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxfordは48歳，母Alice FitzWalterは41歳であった。約1399年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでAlice Hollandと結婚した。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1417年2月15日にイギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンで31歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford(이)가 1385년 8월 15일 영국 에세스 카스틀 헤딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice FitzWalter(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Alice Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1417년 2월 15일 영국 에세스 에를스 코니에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 에를스 코니에 묻혔다.

mn.15 August 1385–15 February 1417: 1385 оны Наймдугаар сарын 15–1417 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 15

pt.15 August 1385–15 February 1417: 15 de agosto de 1385–15 de fevereiro de 1417
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford nasceu em 15 de agosto de 1385, em Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzWalter, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Holland aproximadamente 1399, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1417, em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford родился 15 августа 1385 г. в местности кастл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzWalter, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Holland около 1399 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 15 февраля 1417 г. в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия.

es.15 August 1385–15 February 1417: 15 de agosto de 1385–15 de febrero de 1417
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford nació el 15 de agosto de 1385, en Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Aubrey de Vere 10th Earl of Oxford, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Alice FitzWalter, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Alice Holland aproximadamente 1399, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1417, en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra.
